Imports

htemplates, geometry_primitives

Consts

svgMulti = 50
Multiplication ratio for converting float to svg coordinates

Procs

proc toSVGsize(num: float): string {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
Convert float size to svg (multiply by svgMulti) 
proc `<->`(comm: string): XmlNode {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
Create xml comment 
proc newXmlTree(node: string; children: openArray[XmlNode];
                attributes: varargs[tuple[key, val: string]]): XmlNode {...}{.
    raises: [], tags: [].}
proc flipUp(node: XmlNode): XmlNode {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
Multiply y axis by -1 
proc svgScale(node: XmlNode; scale: (float, float)): XmlNode {...}{.
    raises: [ValueError], tags: [].}
Scale both dimensions of svg node 
proc svgScale(node: XmlNode; x, y: float | int): XmlNode
Scale both dimensions of svg node 
proc svgRotate(node: XmlNode; deg: int | float): XmlNode
Wrap node into g tag with trasnform attribute set to rotate(deg) 
proc makeSVGGroup(nodes: openArray[XmlNode]): XmlNode {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
proc svgTranslate(node: XmlNode; x, y: int | float | string): XmlNode
Wrap node into g tag with transform attribute set to translate(...). Basically move node to position x, y 
proc makeSVG(name: string; attributes: varargs[tuple[key, val: string]];
             text: Option[string] = none(string)): XmlNode {...}{.raises: [],
    tags: [].}
Create svg node with name, attributes and possible child text node that contains text 
proc makeStyle(input: varargs[tuple[key: string, val: string]]): string {...}{.
    raises: [ValueError], tags: [].}
proc makeText(text: string; p: Vec; textClass = "coordinate"): XmlNode {...}{.
    raises: [ValueError], tags: [].}
Create text at position p 
proc `&`(attrs, addition: XmlAttributes): XmlAttributes {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
proc toSVG(p: Vec; annotate: static[char] = 'n';
           style: Option[string] = none(string)): XmlNode
Generate svg circle at position p and possibly annotate it with coordinates. Coordinate annotation is controlled using annoate and can take several values ('n' for no annotation, 'r' and 'l' for right and left respectively) 
proc toSVG(line: Line): XmlNode {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
proc toSVGImage(body: seq[XmlNode]; width: int = 480; height: int = 480): XmlNode {...}{.
    raises: [ValueError], tags: [].}
